title: Repository Baseline, Node 24, TypeScript 7, Compatibility, and Reproduction · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs repository baseline, node 24, typescript 7, compatibility, and reproduction from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for reproducible strict TypeScript Pokedex repository after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Inspect revision, worktree, package metadata, lockfile, configuration inheritance, tests, fixtures, secrets, licenses, and recovery anchor.

Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
